人類を救う“希望”<br>って言われるほどのお方:
Someone said to be the very 'hope'
that could save humanity...
いったいどんな人なんだろう？: <size=24>...What kind of person could they be?
お前か？<br>三大国からの使者ってのは:
You're the one?
The envoy from the Three Nations?
先に言っとくが、<br>俺は引き受けないぞ？:
I'll tell you upfront—
I'm not taking the job, all right?
言わなくても察しはつくさ。<br>どうせ厄介事だろ？:
I don't need you to tell me. I can guess.
It's trouble, isn't it?
こんな辺境の地までわざわざ<br>厄介者の俺に会いに来るんだ:
Coming all the way to this backwater
just to see a troublemaker like me...
厄介事の依頼しか<br>考えられないだろ？:
It could only be
a troublesome request, right?
数か月前の謎の大穴の出現、<br>そして巨大な化け物の襲撃……:
Several months ago, the mysterious Abyss
appeared, followed by an attack from a massive creature...
大穴周辺の小国が一晩で<br>地図から消えたと噂に聞く……:
I've heard rumors that small nations near the Abyss
vanished from the map in a single night...
三大国の戦力を集結させ<br>巨大な怪物はなんとか退けました:
Combining the forces of the Three Nations,
we managed to drive back the enormous beast.
前線基地の”司令官”に<br>着任いただきたいのですっ！:
We wish for you to take the post
of Commander of our frontline base!
三大国が共同出資し、突貫工事で<br>建設中って噂の基地か……:
That base the Three Nations are jointly funding
and rushing to build—that one, huh...
お願いしますっ！ どうか、<br>あなたの力を貸してくださいっ！:
Please! We beg you—
please lend us your strength!
最初に言っただろ？<br>他を当たってくれ……:
I told you at the beginning, didn't I?
Go find someone else...
ほら、立てるか？<br>しっかし、豪快にすっ転んだなぁ～:
Here. Can you stand?
That was quite the tumble, though~...
あなたが司令官になってくれるまで<br>この手は離しませんっ！:
I won't let go of your hand until you agree
to become our Commander!
あなたは三大国から追われ、<br>投獄されてしまいますっ！:
You'll be hunted by the Three Nations
and thrown in prison!
も、もしかしたら、<br>お命もどうなるか……:
A-And, possibly...
your very life may be at risk too...
なるほどな。最初から俺に<br>拒否権なんてなかったわけだ……:
I see. So from the beginning,
I never had the right to refuse...
……まあいい。<br>どうせ暇を持て余していたところだ:
...Fine, whatever.
I had nothing but time on my hands anyway.
引き受けてやるよ、<br>その化け物退治を……:
I'll take the job,
dealing with those monsters...
